description: Supply-Bottleneck Boom + Capital-Cycle detector. Demand-side (backlog/orders + revenue acceleration) AND supply-side (capex destruction, capex/D&A, capacity utilization, money-losing+cutting screen) → capital-cycle phase, early bottleneck calls 18-24mo ahead, consensus-gap, commodity cure-for-low-prices module. Fused with supply-chain-graph / global-business-cycle / liquidity-capacity / themes.
